scope: Work and Study public detail UI follow-up for light-mode white surfaces and body centering independent of the TOC rail.
changed: Re-centered Blog and Work detail article bodies with symmetric desktop grid columns.
Made the TOC rail detached with viewport-aware clamp width.
Changed light-mode root background and public detail surfaces to white.
Added Playwright tests VA-125 and VA-126.
Replaced safe-area arbitrary Tailwind classes with named CSS utilities.
Restricted Tailwind source detection to src to avoid scanning reports and backups.
intentionallyNotChanged: Backend API, database, domain, and persistence code.

goalVerification.requirement: Light-mode basic color should be white.
goalVerification.evidence: Root light --background is pure white and VA-126 passed.

goalVerification.requirement: Cards, backgrounds, and bordered detail areas should be white in light mode.
goalVerification.evidence: TOC, related shell, related cards, page shell, body, and content root are verified by VA-126.

goalVerification.requirement: The wider TOC rail must not push Work/Study content left.
goalVerification.evidence: VA-125 verifies Blog and Work article body center at the 1440px viewport midpoint within 4px.

validations.name: Red Playwright before implementation
validations.result: failed as expected: body center 152px off; light body background 7 RGB levels below white

validations.name: Focused local Playwright
validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:13016 BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18082 ENABLE_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=true PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=visible npx playwright test tests/ui-quality-blog-detail-visuals.spec.ts --grep "VA-125|VA-126" --workers=1

validations.name: Relevant local Playwright regression subset
validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:13016 BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18082 ENABLE_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=true PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=visible npx playwright test tests/ui-quality-blog-detail-visuals.spec.ts tests/public-blog-toc-layout.spec.ts tests/ui-quality-visual-advanced.spec.ts tests/ui-improvement-related-content-width.spec.ts tests/ui-improvement-blog-toc.spec.ts tests/public-detail-toc-fallback.spec.ts tests/mobile-public-navigation.spec.ts tests/ui-header-responsive.spec.ts --workers=1

validations.name: ESLint
validations.command: npm run lint -- changed frontend/test files

validations.name: Docker dev stack build and readiness
validations.result: frontend/backend images built; backend health ok; frontend login 200 after nginx recreated with nginx/default.conf

validations.name: Focused Docker Playwright
validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:13017 BACKEND_PUBLISH_PORT=18180 ENABLE_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=true PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=visible npx playwright test tests/ui-quality-blog-detail-visuals.spec.ts --grep "VA-125|VA-126" --workers=1

risks: Docker Desktop resource limits were not changed or proven to be 2 core / 8GB.
Full npm test was not run; targeted Vitest passed and the pre-existing public-static-routes stale mock issue remains out of scope.
Full core E2E was not rerun; targeted local and Docker Playwright coverage was used for this UI-scoped follow-up.
Docker stack remains running on frontend http://127.0.0.1:13017 and backend http://127.0.0.1:18180 for inspection.
finalRecommendation: Commit this branch and push/open it toward dev; run CI and a full promotion suite before merging to main.
